roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CAL MOTION MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS -- FILED

/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH5 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 5D/CTS  5/FOP1  3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/X:INSTALL IID FOR 6 MONTHS,/PF390 18/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/OR25/EMAT/RESTV/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BYREFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/REMA/4019HALF/DAWF/CONTD:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/
/CAL TO SET OR DISPO/X ADD COUNT 5- 23152(B)VC, MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 5/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:DEFT'S MOT MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/LDPX:05-13-19/CTORD:ELECTRONICMONITORING & SCRAM REQUIREMENTS ARE TERMINATED/X:ATTEND AA MEETINGS 2X PERWEEK,/X:RANDOM ALCOHOL TESTING 1X PER WEEK TO BE COORDINATED BY DEFENSE COUNSEL,/X:CONFIRM PREHEARING CONFERENCE DATE OF 04-11-19/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/OR/NTW60/LDPX:05-13-19 (60TH)/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSAND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/X: BASED ON REPORT RECEIVED BY APD,COURT WILL RESERVE JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION,/
/CAL:PHC/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO, DOP /CONTD:TO SET OR DISPOSE/DOP/
